factors.label: Counter Rumour
factors.description: A competing narrative contradicting the main news
factors.effect: Reduces negative sentiment by 15-25%, increases neutral

factors.label: Authority Denial
factors.description: An official source publicly denies the news
factors.effect: Splits reaction — increases skeptic engagement, reduces institutional trust

factors.label: Viral Controversy
factors.description: An unrelated controversy floods the information space
factors.effect: Reduces virality of main story by 30-50%, drowns passive consumers

factors.label: Confirmation Leak
factors.description: A leaked document appears to confirm the story
factors.effect: Amplifies negative sentiment by 20-35%, spikes emotional reactors
